title: astragalus exiguus
intro: Astragalus exiguus, also known as the small milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of China and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which enable the body to adapt to stress and support immune function. The health benefits of Astragalus exiguus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural defenses against infections and diseases. Astragalus exiguus can be prepared as a herbal supplement in various forms, such as capsules, tablets, teas, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote longevity.
